name: Confucianism
tagline: Become who you are through relationships, ritual, and self-cultivation.
summary: Confucianism teaches that human beings are fundamentally relational — we become ourselves through the roles we inhabit and the care we give. Self-cultivation, ritual propriety, and the pursuit of benevolence transform both the individual and society.

quotes.text: To know what you know and know what you don't — that is knowledge.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: The man who moves mountains begins by carrying away small stones.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: He who learns but does not think is lost.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: The beginning of wisdom is to call things by their proper names.
quotes.author: Confucius

modern_echoes: East Asian education and family culture
